prompt_md: A team wants to make their payment processing swappable so they can change providers later without touching business logic. **Select every practice that supports this goal.**

choices: Define a `PaymentProvider` contract listing the capabilities callers need (charge, refund, status)
Have the checkout, billing, and refund flows depend only on the `PaymentProvider` contract
Call the specific provider's SDK directly from each flow that needs to take a payment
Decide which provider to use in one startup/config point and inject it into callers
Write a thin adapter per provider that translates the contract into that provider's API
